name: Mali GPU Optimization
description: Mali TBDR (Helio G100 / G57 MC2) performance tuning for Minecraft 26.1.2. VulkanMod-safe: engine-side particle spawn/distance caps and tick budgeting. No GL-render-path hooks (safe under Vulkan backend).

custom.maligpu:target: Mali-G57 MC2 / MediaTek Helio G100 (Valhall, TBDR)
